---
title: "Math 153 Project Proposal"
author: "Yatziri I. Carmona Ochoa, Alessandra Ela, and Aabhas S."
format: pdf
editor: visual
execute: 
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Project Proposal

Bayesian network:

```{r}
library(bnRep)
library(bnlearn)

#diabetes bayesian network
data("diabetes")
graphviz.plot(diabetes)

#edges
arcs(diabetes)

#parents and children of diabetes node
parents(diabetes, "DIAB")
children(diabetes, "GLUC")

diabetes$DIAB
```

Original baby dataset (limited)

```{r}
library(MedDataSets)

View(babies_tbl_df)
plot(babies_tbl_df)
```

Expanded baby dataset:

```{r}
library(UsingR)
babies_tbl_df
```
